news.headline: G-7 draft text pledges to address excessive economic imbalances.

news.summary: Nokia Corporation made an announcement on 22 May 2025 at 16:00 EEST regarding changes in its own shares. A total of 215,846 Nokia shares (NOKIA) were transferred by the company without payment today to participants of Nokia's equity-based incentive plans in line with plan regulations. This transfer was executed based on the Board of Directors' decision to issue company-held shares to fulfill its obligations to plan participants as previously disclosed on 11 November 2024. After this transfer, Nokia Corporation now holds 65,828,924 of its own shares.
news.headline: Nokia transferred 215,846 own shares without consideration to incentive plan participants. Total own shares now 65,828,924.

news.summary: Fartcoin (CRYPTO: FARTCOIN) is at the forefront of the latest surge in meme coins, displaying an impressive 18% increase in just 24 hours. With traders setting their sights on a potential climb to $2 in the short term, the current statistics are as follows: Fartcoin is priced at $1.53 with a market capitalization of $1.53 billion, showing a positive 17.9% trend over the past 24 hours and a 19.1% increase over the last 7 days. In comparison, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.2408 with a market cap of $36 billion, reflecting a 6.2% gain in the last 24 hours and a 5.4% rise over the past 7 days. Similarly, Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is valued at $0.00001531 with a market cap of $9.02 billion, having experienced a 5% surge in the last 24 hours and a 0.96% increase over the previous 7 days. Market analysts point to Fartcoin's current trajectory, comparing it to early Bitcoin movements, and anticipate a potential spark in the meme coin market, with projections of hitting new all-time highs. Altcoin Sherpa foresees a promising run ahead. The detailed article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Fartcoin leads meme coin rally, up 18% to $1.53 with a market cap of $1.53 billion. Traders eye $2 next. Dogecoin at $0.2408 with $36 billion market cap. Shiba Inu at $0.00001531 with $9.02 billion market cap. Analysts predict further surges.

news.summary: In San Diego on May 22, 2025, LPL Financial LLC revealed that Beacon Financial has become a part of LPL Financial’s broker-dealer, Registered Investment Advisor (RIA), and custodial platforms. The move aligns Beacon Financial with Momentum Wealth Partners, an established firm that aids LPL-affiliated advisors. The team from Beacon Financial consists of 10 advisors who collectively managed around $850 million in advisory, brokerage, and retirement plan assets. They made the transition from Cetera to join LPL.
news.headline: LPL Financial and Momentum Wealth Partners gain Beacon Financial team with $850 million in assets from Cetera.

news.summary: Bitcoin surged to a historic peak, reaching close to $112,000 on Wednesday. Progress was noted in the legislation of cryptocurrency bills. Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are poised for significant growth. This significant milestone underscores the rising interest and potential in the crypto market.
news.headline: Bitcoin price hits record high near $112,000 as crypto bills advance; Bitcoin ETFs poised for breakouts.

news.summary: MakeMyTrip's price performance has been on the rise, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 77 to 82. The company is projected to see a substantial increase in profits this year, prompting the rating upgrade.
news.headline: MakeMyTrip projected to see significant profit increase this year with Relative Strength Rating upgrade from 77 to 82.

news.summary: The integration of artificial intelligence is transforming the landscape of cybersecurity, leading to a challenging competition between cyber defenders and advanced attackers. According to a top official at Palo Alto, this shift is fueling a significant arms race in the industry. Investors are advised to monitor these trends closely as they navigate the evolving sector.
news.headline: AI is transforming cybersecurity, creating an arms race between defenders and attackers. Investors should pay attention.

news.summary: Lorne Michaels, known for creating the iconic show "Saturday Night Live" (SNL), began his career as a comedian but quickly transitioned to producing. Over the years, Michaels has consistently pushed boundaries to ensure the show continues to be a success. His innovative approach has helped SNL attract a large audience, with the show boasting impressive viewership numbers. Michaels' dedication to keeping viewers entertained and engaged has been a key factor in the show's enduring popularity.
news.headline: "SNL creator Lorne Michaels, also a comedian turned producer, continues pushing limits to provide laughs."

news.summary: As artificial intelligence gains attention, companies with the top AI technology are seeing significant growth. These AI stocks are either benefiting from revenue or gaining a competitive advantage through this rapidly advancing technology. With the rise of OpenAI consumer devices, there is speculation about potential competition for Apple. This development represents a critical juncture for AI stocks, as investors now look for tangible results in this innovative sector.
news.headline: AI stocks need to prove revenue or strategic edge from AI tech. OpenAI may challenge Apple in consumer market.

news.summary: Shares of Snowflake surged after the company reported impressive first-quarter earnings that exceeded analysts' expectations. The data warehousing company's product revenue guidance for the upcoming June quarter also surpassed estimates. The strong performance was attributed to Snowflake's focus on advancing artificial intelligence technology.
news.headline: Snowflake stock surges on beating Q1 earnings targets and strong guidance, with June quarter product revenue exceeding expectations.

news.summary: Shares of BJ's Wholesale climbed towards a potential buy point from a flat-base, following better-than-expected earnings for the first quarter. While their earnings exceeded expectations, sales fell short. This development positions BJ's Wholesale to possibly reach a buy point.
news.headline: BJ's Wholesale stock approaches buy point after Q1 earnings exceed expectations, despite sales miss.

news.summary: On Thursday, Ralph Lauren exceeded expectations for the fourth quarter. The premium retailer projected growth in sales and expansion in margins despite challenges from tariffs and consumer pressures. The company's positive performance led to a rise in stock prices. Ralph Lauren expects a modest increase in margins going forward.
news.headline: Ralph Lauren beats Q4 views, expects 'modest' margin expansion despite tariffs, consumer pressures.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Primech AI Pte. Ltd. revealed the successful launch of its autonomous bathroom cleaning robot, HYTRON, at a top lifestyle and shopping hub in Singapore. HYTRON is a cutting-edge robot developed by Primech Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PMEC), the parent company of Primech AI. This deployment marks a major achievement for Primech AI in its objective to transform facility management using innovative robotics and AI solutions.
news.headline: Primech AI leases HYTRON robot at Singapore mall, a part of its mission to revolutionize facility services with AI.

news.summary: XRP price has surged by 4% to $2.43 in the last 24 hours, with open interest also increasing by 25%. Positive market activity suggests a return of investor optimism, with a potential rally to $14 if a bull flag pattern is confirmed. XRP saw gains following Bitcoin hitting new all-time highs above $111,000. Historically, rises in open interest have preceded major price rallies, such as when President Trump directed the creation of a crypto strategic reserve in early March. The XRP/USD pair shows bullish momentum, with a target of $14.50 if a weekly candlestick closes above $2.48. Analysts predict further gains for XRP, with support from moving averages and the relative strength index. The altcoin must flip the all-time high volume-weighted average prices to continue the bullish trend. XRP could potentially reach between $5.24 and $17 by 2025. Trading and investment actions carry risks, and readers should conduct their own research before deciding.
news.headline: XRP futures OI up by 25%, price spikes 4% to $2.43. Bull flag pattern could lead to $14 rally. Positive market sentiment.

news.summary: Informatica, a prominent enterprise specializing in AI-powered cloud data management, was recently acknowledged by Gartner, Inc. as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Integration Platform as a Service (iPaaS). Out of the 16 vendors assessed, Informatica secured a position in the Leaders’ Quadrant based on its excellent Completeness of Vision and strong Ability to Execute. This recognition highlights their competitive edge within the iPaaS market.
news.headline: Informatica named leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for iPaaS, recognized among 16 vendors for completeness of vision and ability to execute.

news.summary: In New York today, Lynq, a real-time yield-bearing settlement network for digital assets, revealed that Fireblocks, an enterprise platform for managing digital asset operations and establishing innovative blockchain businesses, has partnered with Lynq as a launch collaborator. Established in April 2025, Lynq was created through a joint effort by Arca Labs, Tassat Group, and tZERO Group. Fireblocks joins Lynq's expanding consortium of early adopters, which also includes Avalanche and B2C2.
news.headline: Fireblocks partners with Lynq, a real-time yield-bearing settlement network for digital assets. Lynq, launched in April 2025, involves collaboration between Arca Labs, Tassat Group, and tZERO Group. Fireblocks joins as a launch partner along with other early adopters.

news.summary: In the recent update, it has been reported that the country's economy is experiencing a growth rate of 5.2%, which is higher than the projected 4.8%. This growth has been attributed to increased consumer spending and strong numbers in the manufacturing sector. In addition, the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.9%, against the previous rate of 4.5%. Analysts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months, leading to further improvements in the overall economic outlook.

news.headline: Sky Quarry plans to reach full production capacity of 800,000 barrels yearly at Foreland Refinery through strategic growth.

news.summary: In Chicago, a new inventory platform equipped with traceability features has been introduced to enhance operations. The platform offers real-time tracking, batch-level visibility, and automated lot control, boosting efficiency and accuracy in managing inventory.
news.headline: FoodReady unveils AI upgrade for its platform in Chicago, enhances food safety/quality. Features real-time tracking.

news.summary: Global Student Accommodation (GSA), a key player in student housing worldwide, has revealed the completion of a significant financial deal today. The company sealed a $500 million senior loan agreement with Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a prominent financial institution globally. This move not only reinforces the bond between GSA and Wells Fargo but also highlights the strong interest from lenders in the U.S. student housing market. The loan facility encompasses 23 assets, underlining GSA's commitment to expanding its presence in the sector.
news.headline: Global Student Accommodation secures $500M refinancing with Wells Fargo, showing strong demand for student housing.

news.summary: In Seattle, new home listings in the U.S. surged by 8.4% year over year, reaching their peak in nearly three years by the end of the four weeks leading up to May 18. This data comes from a recent report by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), a real estate brokerage known for its technology-focused approach. Despite the rise in listings, potential buyers seem hesitant as pending sales decreased by 2.2%. This drop marks the lowest level for this period according to Redfin's records dating back to 2015. Additionally, there has been a 5% decrease in mortgage purchase applications.
news.headline: New U.S. home listings increased by 8.4% YoY to highest level in nearly three years, but pending sales dropped 2.2%.

news.summary: A recent study published in the peer-reviewed journal Obesity Pillars revealed that Sea-Band Nausea Relief Bands have been effective in reducing GLP-1 associated nausea. The research, conducted on trial participants, showed that one-third of individuals reported experiencing relief within just 5 minutes of using the bands. This study provides further evidence of the product's efficacy in addressing nausea, highlighting its quick and consistent results.
news.headline: Sea-Band Nausea Relief Bands reduce GLP-1 nausea; 1/3 trial participants felt relief within 5 mins - Study in Obesity Pillars.

news.summary: The UK's Court of Appeal has partially dismissed a lawsuit by Bitcoin SV investors against major crypto exchanges, including Binance, for de-listing the token in 2019. Investors (sub-class B) claiming over 8.9 billion pounds in damages were ruled out of speculative damages based on BSV's growth potential. The court rejected the claim that BSV could reach the status of top cryptocurrencies BTC and BCH. Investors were advised to mitigate losses by selling or reinvesting in other assets. The court ruled that the "market mitigation rule" applies to freely tradable assets like BSV, with damages measured post-delisting. An argument regarding the "loss of chance" for price gains was also rejected due to crypto's volatile nature. Binance also seeks to dismiss a $1.76 billion lawsuit from the FTX estate, attributing FTX's collapse to internal fraud, not external factors.
news.headline: UK court partially dismisses BSV investor's £8.9 billion lawsuit against Binance. Court rejects claims of missed opportunities. Binance seeks to dismiss $1.76B FTX suit.

news.summary: New York - On May 22, 2025, Persado, a prominent AI-driven marketing solutions provider, unveiled a groundbreaking technology that integrates content compliance, brand suitability, and performance. This innovation has resulted in a remarkable 90% reduction in the need for legal reviews and has significantly expedited the launch of campaigns. This advancement is poised to revolutionize the industry by accelerating the marketing process and streamlining compliance measures.
news.headline: Persado introduces AI for financial services, reducing legal reviews by 90% and accelerating campaign launches.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Los Angeles, No Matter What Recovery, a prominent addiction treatment facility catering to the LGBTQ+ community, revealed that Executive Director Mell McCracken spoke at the prestigious 20th International Institute for Trauma and Addiction Professionals. This event showcased McCracken's expertise in the field and highlighted the center's commitment to addressing addiction issues within the LGBTQ+ population.
news.headline: Executive Director Mell McCracken from No Matter What Recovery spoke at IITAP Symposium, seeking to address LGBTQ+ addiction issues.

news.summary: Centennial, Colorado - NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU), a leader in high-power blue laser technology, has disclosed its plan to acquire Tekne S.p.A. (“TEKNE”), a renowned provider of integrated electronic warfare and cyber abilities for military vehicles. The acquisition is subject to approval from the Italian government as part of the "golden power" regulations that govern foreign investments in critical sectors related to national security.NUBURU's move to acquire TEKNE underscores its strategic aim to expand its presence in the defense industry, with a focus on enhancing its technological capabilities.
news.headline: NUBURU targets acquisition of TEKNE, a provider of electronic warfare and cyber capabilities in military vehicles. Waiting for Italian gov approval.

news.summary: VinTech, a top provider of fintech and AI solutions, showcased their capabilities at the 23rd Asia Pacific Trading Summit in Hong Kong on May 22, 2025. The event, organized by the FIX Trading Community, highlighted VinTech's expertise in the field. This demonstration underscores the growing potential of AI in financial technology, with attendees witnessing firsthand the innovative solutions offered by VinTech. This event attracted a significant number of industry professionals and enthusiasts interested in the intersection of finance and technology, indicating a strong interest in advancements within the sector.
news.headline: VinTech presents AI vision at FIX Trading Summit in Hong Kong. Highlight AI potential in fintech.

news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida on May 22, 2025, the Gout Education Society has introduced a new campaign titled "Crystal Clear." This initiative aims to emphasize the need for clarity in gout diagnosis, treatment, and management for patients and medical professionals. Starting now, the campaign will seek to raise awareness and provide educational resources on gout.
news.headline: "Gout Education Society promotes 'Crystal Clear' communication for gout management. Launches campaign emphasizing clarity for patients and medical professionals."

news.summary: Established in 1991, Himed has become a renowned provider of premium calcium phosphate bioceramic materials and surfacing solutions worldwide. The company has seen remarkable growth, especially in South Korea, where it has experienced a substantial expansion.
news.headline: Himed and I&H Global celebrate 15 years of partnership in South Korea. Himed, founded in 1991, supplies calcium phosphate materials.

news.summary: In Seattle, Redfin, a technology-powered real estate brokerage (NASDAQ: RDFN), predicts that the median U.S. home-sale price will maintain stability in the third quarter and drop by 1% year over year by the fourth quarter. Their latest report anticipates mortgage rates to hover around 7% for the rest of the year. This projection represents a significant shift from the continuous home-price uptrends witnessed in recent years, with the exception of a brief period in 2023.
news.headline: Redfin predicts 1% decrease in home prices by year-end, with mortgage rates hovering near 7%.

news.summary: ZincFive, a company specializing in sustainable battery solutions, is increasing its presence in the EMEA region. This expansion includes the opening of a new certified warehouse and service hub in Portland, Oregon. The move comes in response to the growing global demand for their environmentally friendly batteries.
news.headline: ZincFive expands global reach with EMEA warehouse and service hub to meet rising battery demand.

news.summary: Newell Brands Inc. disclosed that their President and CEO, Chris Peterson, along with CFO Mark Erceg, are scheduled to speak at the dbAccess Global Consumer Conference in Paris at 2:30 a.m. ET (8:30 a.m. CEST) on June 4, 2025. The presentation will be available via webcast accessible through the Investors section of the company's website at www.newellbrands.com. The webcast will also be archived for future reference.
news.headline: Newell Brands to present at dbAccess Global Consumer Conference in Paris on June 4, 2025, at 2:30 a.m. ET. Webcast available.
